author: ec2-user
text: Isolated platform/gateway slice integrated as 349dae59, d548d4a9, e6ec78ed, 7994adaa, 9f31ed83. Gates: puck native_sim build passed with SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH=1; gateway 53 tests/doc-tests and Clippy -D warnings; announce 166 tests and Ruff. Reviews found no puck/announce defects and filed deferred gateway follow-ups project-LICHEN-z4sn (P1 exact-fill SLIP ring aliases full/empty) and project-LICHEN-mkaq (P2 partial TUN writes split packets).
